response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the seniority bar for an entry-level role, with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior titles across multiple companies. Technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, SQL) map well to the stack, but PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not explicitly listed (MongoDB is the primary DB experience). The mismatch in seniority creates real risks around salary expectations, retention, and motivation fit, though the technical strength and Berlin location could justify an exploratory conversation if the team is open to reshaping the role or if the candidate is genuinely seeking a step down.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack background with AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Berlin-based, satisfying the on-site presence requirement
Track record of clean architecture, TDD, and cross-stack ownership
concerns: Severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level position — retention and engagement risk
Primary database experience is MongoDB; PostgreSQL and Nest.js not evidenced
Only basic German, which may matter for an on-site consulting/construction-industry team
